name: Okie Grannie Wild Plum Jelly
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure the sugar and set aside.
2. Do not reduce the amount of sugar.
3. In a large pot, stir the fruit pectin into the wild plum juice and water. Ensure the mixture does not exceed one-third of the pot's capacity to allow for a full rolling boil.
4. Bring the mixture to a full rolling boil over high heat, stirring constantly.
5. At once, stir in the sugar.
6. Continue stirring until the mixture reaches a full rolling boil, boiling hard for 1 minute with constant stirring using a wooden spoon.
7. Remove from heat and skim off any foam with a metal spoon.
8. Immediately ladle into hot pint jars, leaving 1/8 inch space at the top of each jar.
9. Wipe any spills from the rims and threads of the jars with a damp cloth.
10. Quickly seal the jars with hot lids and secure the bands firmly.
11. Allow the jelly to cool before storing it in a cool, dry place. Check seals.
